description.overview: Not actually a spaniel, this ancient breed served as watchdogs in Tibetan monasteries. They're alert, independent dogs who bond closely with their families.
description.history: The Tibetan Spaniel originated in Tibet.
description.temperament: Known for being assertive, alert, intelligent.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their double coat, silky, moderate length coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Not actually a spaniel, this ancient breed served as watchdogs in Tibetan monasteries. They're alert, independent dogs who bond closely with their families.
